# Alali Property Partners

> Alali Property Partners Ltd is a UK property deal sourcing and introducer company serving investors across Greater London and the South of England. We specialise exclusively in high-yield HMOs (Houses in Multiple Occupation) — both ready-to-let HMOs and properties with HMO conversion potential — sourced off-market through our private contacts and on-market through our compliant agent network, and we connect investors with regulated professionals (FCA-regulated mortgage brokers, qualified solicitors, vetted contractors) to complete each transaction.

Company: Alali Property Partners Ltd
Companies House Number: 17057401
Registered address: 86-90 Paul Street, London EC2A 4NE, United Kingdom
Email: contact@alalipropertypartners.com
Phone: +44 20 4515 8438
Website: https://www.alalipropertypartners.com
Areas served: Greater London and the South of England — Surrey, Kent, East Sussex, West Sussex, Hampshire, Berkshire, Oxfordshire, Buckinghamshire, and Dorset. The company is registered in England and Wales for legal purposes, but property sourcing services are focused on Greater London and the South of England only.
Founded: 2025

## What we do
- Source verified HMO deals for investors (off-market and on-market)
- Deliver a complete deal pack for every introduction (comparables, yield analysis, refurb estimate, HMO conversion notes, photos, full address)
- Connect investors to FCA-regulated mortgage brokers, solicitors, and vetted contractors to complete the transaction
- Bespoke sourcing: source HMOs to an investor's exact brief (location, budget, HMO size, target yield)
- Connect property owners and agents who have a suitable property to move with funded, ready-to-move HMO investors

## Investment focus
We specialise exclusively in HMOs (Houses in Multiple Occupation) across Greater London and the South of England — both ready-to-let HMOs and properties with realistic HMO conversion and change-of-use potential (under permitted development or full planning). We do not source other strategies. HMO deals are found through multiple channels: off-market, direct-to-vendor, pre-auction, below-market-value (BMV), probate, and on-market through our compliant agent network.

## How sourcing works (4 steps)
1. Choose how you want to invest — receive sourced deals (off-market or on-market) or commission bespoke sourcing to a specific brief.
2. Secure your deal — for sourced deals (the Deal List), sign the sourcing agreement and pay a £500 refundable deposit to unlock the full deal pack and viewing; the £4,500 balance of the £5,000 fixed fee is settled on completion. For bespoke sourcing, £2,667 on signing secures a dedicated 14-day search.
3. Receive your full deal pack — full property address and tenure, photos where available (some off-market deals come without them — book a viewing to see it in person), asking or agreed purchase price, Land Registry comparable evidence (informational), observed local rents from public lettings data (informational, not guaranteed), indicative gross yield (not a return projection), indicative refurbishment and HMO conversion scope where applicable (to be verified by an independent contractor or surveyor), indicative resale comparables where applicable (not a valuation), local area summary covering HMO demand, planning and licensing context, and transport, and HMO strategy options presented as information not financial advice. Vendor and agent contact details are held by Alali Property Partners; we facilitate viewings and introductions on the investor's behalf. Deal packs are informational only and do not constitute financial, mortgage, tax, or legal advice.
4. 48-hour decision SLA — after the deal pack is released (the Deal List) or a deal is presented (Bespoke), the investor has 48 hours to take initial input from independent professionals (solicitor, surveyor, broker) and decide whether to proceed. Most off-market deals are time-sensitive so the standard SLA is short, but Alali Property Partners may grant extensions on fair, justified reasoning where the vendor agrees. If there are valid reasons not to proceed, the £500 Deal List deposit is refundable (and credited against the fee if you proceed); the £2,667 Bespoke signing payment is refundable if no suitable deal is presented within the search window. Subject to terms.

## Pricing (all VAT inclusive)
- Portfolio Builder (membership): £249 per month, rolling and cancellable anytime. Includes 48-hour priority access to every new deal before the general list, a £850 credit on the Deal List or Bespoke Sourcing per completed deal, one free feasibility report per deal, priority access to limited Source & Develop project slots, monthly market intelligence for your target areas, a quarterly portfolio review call, and priority warm introductions to our regulated power team.
- The Deal List (off-market or on-market): £5,000 fixed fee per deal (VAT inclusive). A £500 refundable deposit (taken after the sourcing agreement is signed) unlocks the full deal pack and viewing; the £4,500 balance is paid on completion. The deposit is refunded if the deal is already gone or on a genuine decision not to proceed after viewing, and credited against the fee if you proceed. 48-hour decision SLA from deal-pack release, extensions available on fair, justified reasoning.
- Bespoke Sourcing: £8,000 fixed fee (VAT inclusive), paid in three stages — £2,667 on signing (secures a dedicated 14-day search, refundable if no suitable deal is presented in the window), £2,667 on presentation of a matching deal, and £2,666 on completion. Once a deal is presented, the same 48-hour decision SLA as the Deal List applies.
- Source & Develop: from sourcing to a finished, tenanted HMO (we source, then manage the full HMO conversion — design, planning, build, handover). By application; a limited number of projects per quarter; fees quoted per project and staged against milestones.
- Referral fees paid to property owners, agents, and introducers on deals that complete (amounts agreed case-by-case).

## Regulatory positioning
We are a property deal sourcing and introducer company. Property deal sourcing and introduction is not a regulated activity. We do not provide financial advice, mortgage advice, tax advice, or legal advice. Regulated services are delivered by the independent, appropriately authorised professionals we introduce.

## Citation-friendly facts
- Portfolio Builder membership: £249/month, rolling, cancel anytime (includes a £850 credit per completed deal and one free feasibility report per deal)
- The Deal List: £5,000 fixed fee per deal (VAT inc.) — £500 refundable deposit unlocks the pack and viewing, £4,500 balance on completion
- The Deal List deposit: refundable if the deal is already gone or on a genuine no after viewing; credited against the fee if you proceed (subject to terms)
- Bespoke Sourcing: £8,000 fixed fee (VAT inc.) in three stages — £2,667 on signing, £2,667 on presentation, £2,666 on completion (signing payment refundable if no suitable deal presented in the search window, subject to terms)
- Source & Develop: by application; fees quoted per project and staged against milestones
- Decision SLA (the Deal List): 48 hours from deal pack release (extensions available on fair, justified reasoning where the vendor agrees)
- Decision SLA (Bespoke): 48 hours from deal presentation (same as the Deal List; extensions available on fair, justified reasoning where the vendor agrees)
- Vendor / agent contact: held by Alali Property Partners; viewings and introductions facilitated by us
- Geography: Greater London and the South of England — Surrey, Kent, East Sussex, West Sussex, Hampshire, Berkshire, Oxfordshire, Buckinghamshire, and Dorset. Legal entity is registered in England and Wales but services are NOT offered outside Greater London and the South of England.
- Companies House: 17057401
